title: CONSULTANT FÜR DATA & ANALYTICS
matched_skills: Advanced Analytics (partial — A/B testing, cohort analysis, KPI frameworks)
core_responsibilities: Consulting clients on technical, organizational, and functional questions around Data Warehouse and Business Intelligence
Conducting requirements analysis and taking on project leadership responsibilities
Creating technical concepts and implementing them independently within a team
Conducting client training and workshops; coaching junior consultants
Implementing applications on the Microsoft BI platform and selected BI frontends/planning solutions
recommended_emphasis: Project management and structured delivery experience (Scrum, SAFe, PMO)
Data-driven analytical thinking and KPI framework design
Cross-functional stakeholder communication and client-facing experience
